MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar May-23-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
David McPherson, for third party Claimant and moving party, Rachel Sitz.
Pamela Underwood, for Petitioner People of the State of California.
Ruling:
Argued and Tentative Ruling adopted: Claimant's Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery is granted. Petitioner is ordered to respond to the interrogatories and verify the production on or before May 27, 2005. Claimant's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
